title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe
writer: Alex Raymond, Basil Dickey, George H. Plympton
actors: Buster Crabbe, Carol Hughes, Charles Middleton
plot: A ravaging plague has struck the Earth threatening no less than global extinction. This alien disease is believed to be the evil spawn of Ming, the merciless Emperor of Planet Mongo. The world's only hope now rests with Flash Gordon.
